overview.name: Auth JWT Variable
overview.description:
This scenario verifies JWT authentication flow using variables.
Test flow includes: 1. Create variables for login endpoint, create endpoint, get endpoint, reset endpoint and expected files. 2. Authenticate via auth tag using variable-based login endpoint. 3. Create protected resource using variable-based endpoint and body. 4. Verify create response = 200 using variable-based expected file. 5. Retrieve protected resources using variable-based endpoint. 6. Verify retrieved resources using variable-based expected file. 7. Reset JWT auth state using variable-based endpoint.
This scenario validates: - Variable injection into auth tag attributes - Variable injection into HTTP endpoints - Variable injection into request body - Variable injection into expected file names - Variable reuse across authenticated JWT flow

auth.comment: Authenticate via JWT auth command using variable-based login endpoint

http.comment: Create protected resource using variable-based endpoint and body
Retrieve protected resources using variable-based endpoint
Reset JWT auth state using variable-based endpoint
